lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: I'm digging for saltpetre, of course. Got to have plenty of saltpetre for the farms. You should grab a spade and get to work too - they always need saltpetre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do with saltpetre?

lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: It's a critical ingredient in a special fertiliser used on the farms here. Just mix it with some compost - ordinary compost, not that super stuff - to make the fertiliser.

lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: Once you've got fertiliser, you can use it on Farmer Gricoller's fruit farm. Alternatively, Hosidius farmers always want some. You could sell it to them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got a spare spade?

lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: Yes, but you've got no room for it.

lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: Yes, but I can see you don't need it.

lines.speaker: Konoo
lines.text: Very well done, now let me get back to digging!
